scripts.test:api-unit: bash -lc 'cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp/apps/api && source .venv/bin/activate && cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp && python scripts/run_python_unittest.py --suite-name api-unit --start-dir tests/unit --pattern "test_*.py" --output coverage/test-results/api-unit.json'
scripts.test:api-unit:coverage: bash -lc 'cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp/apps/api && source .venv/bin/activate && cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp && mkdir -p coverage && python -m coverage run --source=app.services,app.core scripts/run_python_unittest.py --suite-name api-unit --start-dir tests/unit --pattern "test_*.py" --output coverage/test-results/api-unit.json && python -m coverage json -o coverage/api-unit-coverage.json'
scripts.test:functional: bash -lc 'cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp/apps/api && source .venv/bin/activate && cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp && python scripts/run_python_unittest.py --suite-name functional --start-dir tests/functional --pattern "test_*.py" --output coverage/test-results/functional.json'
scripts.test:unit: pnpm test:ui && pnpm test:web && pnpm test:api-unit
scripts.test:unit:coverage: pnpm test:ui:coverage && pnpm test:web:coverage && pnpm test:api-unit:coverage && node scripts/report-unit-coverage.mjs && pnpm test:report
scripts.test:integration: bash -lc 'cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp/apps/api && source .venv/bin/activate && cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp && python scripts/run_python_unittest.py --suite-name integration --start-dir tests/integration --pattern "test_*.py" --output coverage/test-results/integration.json'
scripts.test:compliance: bash -lc 'cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp/apps/api && source .venv/bin/activate && cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp && python scripts/run_python_unittest.py --suite-name compliance --start-dir tests/integration --pattern "test_spec_compliance.py" --output coverage/test-results/compliance.json'
scripts.test:performance: bash -lc 'cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp/apps/api && source .venv/bin/activate && cd /Volumes/data/development/rgp && python scripts/run_python_unittest.py --suite-name performance --start-dir tests/performance --pattern "test_*.py" --output coverage/test-results/performance.json'
scripts.test:comprehensive: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:functional && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:compliance && pnpm test:performance && pnpm test:journey && pnpm test:security && pnpm test:report
scripts.check: pnpm lint:web && pnpm typecheck:web && pnpm build:web
